##RRUFFID=R110181
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Na,Ca,[box])BaCe_2_(CO_3_)_4_(F,O)
##LOCALITY=Demix Quarry, Mont St-Hilaire, Quebec, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Tan colored hexagonal prism associated with albite and siderite (Raman people, check the ID of these associated minerals).The cordylite may be mixed with parisite. Need to check this carefully!
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110181
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
